[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Potin''' was an officer in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]]. In [[6 ABY/Legends|6.5 ABY]] he was stationed aboard [[Corusca Rainbow|''Black Asp'']]. In a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], he fled the [[battle in the Chorax system]], causing his commander, [[Uwlla Iillor]], to write him up for fleeing when not threatened.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Rogue Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
